name: Rumi's Concoction
explicitMods: +12% Chance to Block Attack Damage during Effect
+6% Chance to Block Spell Damage during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: "Yesterday I was clever, so I wanted to change the world.
Today I am wise, so I am changing myself."
-Rumi of the Vaal

socketedItems.secDescrText: Animates a melee weapon or armour, attaching it to an invisible Guardian that fights by your side. Animating multiple items attaches them to the same Guardian. You cannot animate unidentified items. Cannot be used by Traps or Mines. If your Guardian dies you cannot summon an Animated Guardian again in that area.
explicitMods: Can use Items requiring up to Level 82
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Uul-Netol's Vow
explicitMods: Socketed Support Gems can also Support Skills from Equipped Body Armour
flavourText: The time is nigh.
War has come.
We dream as one.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that hits enemies, making those hits penetrate enemy elemental resistances.
explicitMods: Supported Skills deal 10% increased Elemental Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Foulborn Severed in Sleep

mutatedMods: Minions have +5% to Critical Strike Chance
flavourText: His lucky thralls dream eternal,
but we must crawl on our own.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Dive through enemies, dealing weapon damage. If dual wielding attacks with both weapons, dealing the damage of both in one hit. Only works with Daggers, Claws, and One-Handed Swords.
explicitMods: When Dual Wielding, Deals 75% Damage from each Weapon combined
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Consumes a corpse, granting increased critical strike chance and additional critical strike multiplier to your minions. The skill consumes other nearby corpses, increasing the duration for each corpse consumed.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Desecrates the ground, spawning corpses based on monsters in the current area and dealing chaos damage over time to enemies. If you are using the Raise Spectre skill there is a chance to spawn spectral corpses matching your most recently raised Spectres. Spectral corpses cannot be interacted with except by Minion skills.

Spawned corpses' level matches the area level, up to a maximum of Level 80
